query: UPDATE invoiceLineItemMatches SET unitPrice = 49.4000 WHERE matchedItemName = 'Salmon' AND lineDescription LIKE '%SALMON SMKD COHO SLCD FZN BAP%' AND invoiceId BETWEEN 60012 AND 60131;
